summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Camps module. Backend: 26/26 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All camp features working correctly - admin camp CRUD, participant management, payment toggle, teacher read-only access, teacher balance with camp earnings.

Admin camp participant update - PASS

critical_code_review_comments: Camp model and endpoints well structured with proper access control
Teacher balance calculation correctly includes camp_earnings from paid participants only
Frontend components have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Payment toggle functionality works correctly with immediate UI update
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data. Yaz Matematik Kampı with 1 paid participant (Ali Veli, 500₺ payment, 150₺ teacher fee).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Camps module fully tested. Key data: 1) Yaz Matematik Kampı (7. Sınıf, Ahmet Yılmaz, 150₺/student) with 1 paid participant (Ali Veli). 2) teacher1 user is linked to Ahmet Yılmaz teacher (teacher_id: 2b8b2b32-47c0-46d8-a2eb-c570c4ad6a71). 3) Teacher balance shows camp_earnings=150₺ (1 paid × 150₺). 4) All CRUD operations tested for camps and camp_students. 5) Access control verified - teachers can only view their own camps (read-only).

admin_camp_management.list_view: Shows camp name, class, teacher, per_student_fee, total/confirmed/paid counts, status
admin_camp_management.create_camp: Dialog with name, class_level, teacher_id, per_student_teacher_fee fields

admin_participant_management.list_view: Shows student_name, parent_name, phone, registration_status, payment_amount, payment_completed
admin_participant_management.add_participant: Dialog with all required fields + notes

teacher_camp_access.camps_page: Shows only camps assigned to teacher

teacher_balance.camp_earnings: Sum of (paid_students × per_student_fee) for all camps
teacher_balance.camp_earnings_details: Shows breakdown by camp with paid count and fee
